description: Rebase a reviewed track onto main, publish it, and prepare the PR

preconditions.requirement: Every project-scoped packet call includes root
If a required packet returns ok:false, halt and report the packet error

packetFlow.instruction: Resolve the project root with `cadre_project` using `action: "root"`.
Call `cadre_workflow` with `workflow: "ship"` and the requested `trackId` as structured JSON.
Use the returned review gate, git actions, provider actions, CI evidence, warnings, and review_bundle manifest/path list.
When the packet reports `phase_state: "ready"` or `"pending_provider"`, call the packet again with `execute: true` only after required review and provider evidence are available.
If the packet returns `phase_state: "pending_provider"`, execute only returned provider MCP actions and write evidence back through Cadre packets.

Summarize branch, review gate, provider artifact, CI state, publication ledger path, control commit, git-note push state, changed canonical JSON artifacts, generated human projections, and next packet.

forbiddenActions: Do not recreate Cadre control-plane, native event/message state, index, worktree, provider, merge, or cleanup state with shell commands
Do not read or write Markdown projections as canonical state
Do not use Markdown payload fields, legacy Markdown import, or prompt-side state repair
